ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "call_sign" TEXT /* Call sign of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the station */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the station's broadcast license */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_value" INTEGER /* Value of the frequency */,
  "frequency_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the frequency (e.g., kHz, MHz) */,
  "frequency_band" TEXT /* Band to which the frequency belongs (e.g., AM, FM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "powers" (
  "power_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power */,
  "power_value" INTEGER /* Value of the power */,
  "power_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the power (e.g., watts, kilowatts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., individual, corporation) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency */,
  "power_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the record */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., license renewal, frequency change) */,
  "record_status" TEXT /* Status of the record (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "record_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_records_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_records_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_records_power_id FOREIGN KEY ("power_id") REFERENCES powers ("power_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_frequencies" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the station started using the frequency */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the station stopped using the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_powers" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "power_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the station started using the power */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the station stopped using the power */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "power_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_owners" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner started managing the station */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner stopped managing the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Value of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "records_owners" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical record */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner was associated with the record */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner was no longer associated with the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id", "owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES historical_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_notes" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "note_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_notes" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical record */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id", "note_id")
)
